title: Somebody Told Me
why_this_song: Somebody Told Me by The Killers (2004) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "A-rushing, a-rushing around"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Seventeen tracks, and I've had it with this game"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "It's not confidential, I've got potential"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "But heaven ain't close in a place like this"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "But heaven ain't close in a place like this"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

But I just don't know now (Baby, baby)

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "rushing" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "rushing" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "i've" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "i've" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Breaking my back just to know your name
Well, somebody told me you had a boyfriend
That I had in February of last year

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: A-breaking my back just to know your name

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Somebody Told Me" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Somebody Told Me" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
